tools.name: authTokens.createSecondaryAuthToken
tools.description: Create a new secondary Auth Token

tools.name: authTokens.deleteSecondaryAuthToken
tools.description: Delete the secondary Auth Token from your account

tools.name: authTokens.updateAuthTokenPromotion
tools.description: Promote the secondary Auth Token to primary. After promoting the new token, all requests to Twilio using your old primary Auth Token will result in an error.

tools.name: credentials.createCredentialPublicKey
tools.description: Create a new Public Key Credential

tools.name: credentials.deleteCredentialAws
tools.description: Delete a Credential from your account

tools.name: credentials.deleteCredentialPublicKey
tools.description: Delete a Credential from your account

tools.name: credentials.fetchCredentialAws
tools.description: Fetch the AWS credentials specified by the provided Credential Sid

tools.name: credentials.fetchCredentialPublicKey
tools.description: Fetch the public key specified by the provided Credential Sid

tools.name: credentials.listCredentialAws
tools.description: Retrieves a collection of AWS Credentials belonging to the account used to make the request

tools.name: credentials.listCredentialPublicKey
tools.description: Retrieves a collection of Public Key Credentials belonging to the account used to make the request

tools.name: credentials.updateCredentialAws
tools.description: Modify the properties of a given Account

tools.name: credentials.updateCredentialPublicKey
tools.description: Modify the properties of a given Account

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
